items.title: AWS Lambda MicroVMs: From Zero to Running
items.description: Walked through AWS Lambda MicroVMs end-to-end — from provisioning infrastructure with CloudFormation to building a custom image, launching MicroVM instances, and executing code inside them using Claude Code with the AWS MCP plugin.

items.title: Building a Personal AI Assistant in Minutes with OpenClaw
items.description: Spoke at AWS Summit Toronto 2026 on building a personal AI assistant quickly using OpenClaw, powered by AWS Lightsail with all infrastructure managed as code.

items.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration in Amazon Bedrock Using Terraform
items.description: Presented Multi-Agent Collaboration in Amazon Bedrock at AWS Summit Toronto, covering how to design and deploy multi-agent systems with all infrastructure provisioned using Terraform.

items.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration in Amazon Bedrock Using Terraform
items.description: Shared my experience with the AWS New Voices Program and walked through building Multi-Agent Collaboration in Amazon Bedrock, with all infrastructure provisioned using Terraform.
